[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0111100 4
1 0110011 4
2 1000010 2
3 0100000 1
4 0111100 4
5 0110011 4
6 1110011 5
7 1110111 6

01 10 1110001 4
12 21 1110111 6 match 7
23 32 1111111 a
34 43 1101110 5
45 54 0001111 4
56 65 0111111 6
67 76 0110110 4
70 07 0110011 4 match 1 5

60 06 0110101 4
71 17 1110010 4
